Erling Haaland is still setting the pace in the Premier League Golden Boot race with 23 goals, though Brentford's Thiago Rodrigues is hot on his heels with 21 goals, including a league-high 7 penalties!

Liverpool's Hugo Ekitike is quietly having a fantastic season, bagging 11 Premier League goals in just 29 appearances!

"Forget the modern goal machines! 🤯 Ronaldo Nazário's 96/97 season at Barcelona (34 goals in 37 La Liga games) is STILL the pure finishing benchmark. Barcelona's youth talent is lighting up La Liga, with Lamine Yamal (8.35) and Pedri (7.79) both landing in the top three highest-rated players in the league!

The midfield battle that defined an era!

Gerrard vs Lampard. Forget club bias, these two were MONSTERS. Frank Lampard's 177 Premier League goals from midfield is simply outrageous, a pure goal-scoring machine. But Steven Gerrard, with 92 PL assists and those legendary clutch moments (Istanbul, anyone?), truly dragged his teams.

One was the ultimate attacking engine, the other an unstoppable force of nature. Who actually had the bigger overall impact? #PL #FootballLegends
